name: neg_brand_tesla_not_person
body: I bought a Tesla last week and I love it so far.

name: neg_pet_dog_not_person
body: Took Biscuit to the vet this morning. She's a good girl but hates the car.

name: neg_band_name_not_person
body: Saw Wilco at the Riviera last night — best show I've been to in years.

name: neg_book_title_name_not_person
body: Finally finished Middlemarch. George Eliot really knew how to build a character.

name: neg_software_tool_not_person
body: Switched to Obsidian for notes after years of Notion. No regrets.

name: neg_sports_team_not_person
body: The Bulls are on a five-game losing streak. Painful to watch.

name: neg_place_name_not_person
body: Drove through Madison on the way home. Beautiful city but the traffic was rough.

name: neg_no_second_person_solo_run
body: I went for a run this morning. Five miles, felt great.

name: neg_no_second_person_bill_payment
body: Paid the electric bill online. Set up autopay so I don't have to think about it.

name: neg_someone_keyed_car_vague
body: Someone keyed my car in the parking lot overnight. So frustrating.

name: neg_vague_old_friend_no_name
body: Had a great chat with an old friend this afternoon. Hadn't talked in years.

name: neg_typo_ate_as_are_celine_present
body: Jeff are Celine's dinner while she was at work.

name: neg_all_caps_robustness
body: TALKED TO MOM TODAY. SHE WANTS TO VISIT NEXT MONTH. CALLED AUNT ROSA TOO.

name: neg_txt_speak_robustness
body: lol hung out w/ marcus n his gf priya 2day. gr8 time tbh

name: neg_emoji_heavy_robustness
body: Dinner with Dana 🍕 and her brother Leo 🎉 — such a fun night 🥂✨

name: neg_run_on_sentence_robustness
body: Called Ravi about the project and he said it was going fine but then he mentioned that his colleague Yasmin had flagged a bug which took two days to trace back to a config issue that nobody had noticed since the last deploy which Ravi handled himself.

name: neg_fragment_note_robustness
body: Elena — Thursday 3pm

name: neg_very_long_rambling_note
body: So I've been thinking a lot lately, mostly because I had coffee this morning which I probably shouldn't have because it makes me anxious, and I was sitting there looking out the window at the neighbor's garden which is really something this time of year, and then I remembered I need to call Marcus back about the thing he mentioned when we ran into each other at the farmer's market last Saturday, it was something about a job opportunity he heard about from his friend Nadia who apparently works at a consultancy downtown, though I can't remember the name of the firm, and honestly I'm not sure I want to change jobs right now anyway, but it was nice of him to think of me, also I need to buy more coffee.

name: neg_mixed_domain_health_and_general
body: BP was 124/80 at the checkup today. Ran into Kenji in the waiting room — he's seeing the same cardiologist.

name: neg_quoted_speech_speaker_vs_i
body: Fatima told me, "I'm thinking of moving to Denver next spring." Hope she goes for it.

name: neg_relayed_speech_third_party
body: Mom said that Uncle Pete is retiring at the end of the year.

name: neg_product_name_looks_like_given_name
body: Finally picked up Alexa for the kitchen. She'll remind me about timers.

name: neg_movie_character_not_real_person
body: Rewatched Parasite tonight. Loved the way Ki-woo's arc resolves at the end.

name: neg_possessive_of_place_not_person
body: Chicago's winters are brutal but I still love the city.

name: neg_generic_pronoun_they_no_antecedent
body: They really need to fix the potholes on Oak Street. Ridiculous.

name: neg_pet_with_human_name_not_person
body: Oliver scratched the couch again. I love that cat but he is destructive.

name: neg_positive_control_clean_spouse
body: Jeff is married to Celine Hopkins.

name: neg_positive_control_colleague_introduced
body: Priya introduced me to her colleague, Dr. Anand Rao, at the conference.

name: neg_positive_control_sibling_edge
body: Marcus and his sister Lena are flying out for the reunion next weekend.
